description_long: This object is a lush potted Monstera plant, featuring large, glossy green leaves with distinctive natural splits and holes. The leaves are broad, heart-shaped, and arranged in a radial pattern, with some leaves arching outward and others standing more upright. The stems are slender and green, emerging from a central base within a medium-sized, wooden barrel-style pot. The pot has a faceted, vertical plank design with visible wood grain and a slightly weathered appearance. The plant appears healthy and vibrant, with a mix of mature and younger leaves, and the soil is not visible due to the dense foliage. This decorative plant would add a touch of greenery and elegance to urban environments such as lobbies, patios, or sidewalks.
description: A vibrant Monstera plant with large, split green leaves in a rustic wooden barrel-style pot. The foliage is dense and lush, radiating outward from the center.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full spread of large, split Monstera leaves with the pot partially visible at the base.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the overlapping leaves and the dense arrangement of foliage, with the pot mostly obscured.
description_view_2: Side view revealing the wooden barrel-style pot and the arching stems of the plant, with leaves extending horizontally.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the back of the pot and the underside of several leaves, with some stems more visible.
